text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp, yet it's
overshadowed by the approaching Japan Dirt
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm lookin' forward to summer camp, but I can't wait for the Japan Dirt Derby!
choice_data_list: Let's make sure you come back a winner.
Let's make sure you come back a winner.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Just you wait, Oi Racecourse! I'm comin'!
